channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: CBS News poll finds widespread frustration with Trump's economic policies
item.description: Americans are weighed down by gas prices and inflation, and many see a lack of clarity on Iran.

item.title: LIRR strike raises concerns about Monday commute. Here is the latest.
item.description: The LIRR work stoppage has disrupted weekend travel, but the main worry is Monday morning's commute.

item.title: Top Judiciary Democrat Raskin criticizes possible Trump-IRS settlement
item.description: He describes it as a "political slush fund" and argues it violates the Constitution.

item.title: Face the Nation: Fitzpatrick, Suozzi and Gates
item.description: Missed the second half? Reps. Brian Fitzpatrick and Tom Suozzi from the Problem Solvers Caucus appear, along with former Defense Secretary Gates.
